summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a must‑hear show featuring a blistering Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin’s Tower sequence, with overall great audio despite minor phase issues.
review: Fans rave that this Dick's Picks 33 performance is one of the best they’ve ever heard, highlighting the insane Help on the Way/Slipknot! transition and a must‑listen Hotter Than Warm > Slip > Drums > Space > Slip > Franklin’s Tower > One More Saturday Night sequence. The soundboard source is generally praised as almost perfect, though one reviewer notes out‑of‑phase quirks that may require channel inversion or slight speed correction.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are overwhelmingly positive (average 4.8★) and emphasize both stellar musical performance and high‑quality soundboard audio; only a single comment notes minor phase problems, so the rating stays near the top of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally crisp and almost perfect sound quality praised by most reviewers; one user reports tracks are out of phase and suggests inverting the left channel or slight time‑stretching to correct.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers single out the HOTW > Slip > Drums > Space > Slip > Franklin's Tower > OMSN sequence as a highlight, indicating a seamless and exciting flow through the second set.
